reference: WHILE HE STOOD LOOKING AROUND HIM IN BEWILDERMENT A FIREFLY ALIGHTED ON HIS ARM FLASHING ITS LITTLE LANTERN IN THE PRINCE'S FACE IT CRIED THIS WAY MY FRIEND THE FLY SENT ME TO GUIDE YOU TO A PLACE OF SAFETY
text: While he stood looking around him in bewilderment, a firefly alighted on his arm, flashing its little lantern in the prince's face. It cried, "This way, my friend! The fly sent me to guide you to a place of safety."
